basic_details.job_title: STPI Director General Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Software Technology Parks of India (STPI) Director General Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of STPI. A total of 1 Director General vacancy has been announced through the STPI Director General Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 58 years. Age relaxation: Five years age relaxation in DR mode to serving employees of Autonomous Societies under MeitY; age relaxation to Government Servants as per DoPT instructions.

qualification.details: Bachelor degree in Engineering/Technology in Electronics/Electricals/Electronics & Communications/Telecommunications/Computer Science/Information Technology or Masters in Computer Applications or M.Sc. in Design/Mathematics/Statistics/Electronics/Applied Electronics/Operation Research/Total Quality Management/Information Technology OR Master Degree in Tech./Engineering in Electronics/Electricals/Electronics & Communications/Telecommunications/Computer Science OR Ph.D in any of the above subjects with 25/22/17 years post-qualification experience respectively and at least 5 years in Senior Management Capacity.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.meity.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download STPI Director General Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download STPI Director General Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.software_technology_parks_of_india_stpi: Bachelor degree in Engineering/Technology in Electronics/Electricals/Electronics & Communications/Telecommunications/Computer Science/Information Technology or Masters in Computer Applications or M.Sc. in Design/Mathematics/Statistics/Electronics/Applied Electronics/Operation Research/Total Quality Management/Information Technology, Master Degree in Tech./Engineering in Electronics/Electricals/Electronics & Communications/Telecommunications/Computer Science, Ph.D in any of the above subjects

content_sections.heading: STPI Director General Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the STPI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download STPI Director General Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: STPI Director General Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
STPI Director General Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Bachelor degree in Engineering/Technology in Electronics/Electricals/Electronics & Communications/Telecommunications/Computer Science/Information Technology or Masters in Computer Applications or M.Sc. in Design/Mathematics/Statistics/Electronics/Applied Electronics/Operation Research/Total Quality Management/Information Technology OR Master Degree in Tech./Engineering in Electronics/Electricals/Electronics & Communications/Telecommunications/Computer Science OR Ph.D in any of the above subjects with 25/22/17 years post-qualification experience respectively and at least 5 years in Senior Management Capacity.

content_sections.heading: STPI Director General Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 58 years. Age relaxation: Five years age relaxation in DR mode to serving employees of Autonomous Societies under MeitY; age relaxation to Government Servants as per DoPT instructions.

content_sections.heading: STPI Director General Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
STPI Director General Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
STPI Director General Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.meity.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: STPI Director General Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the STPI Director General recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the STPI Director General recruitment is 23rd August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Director General post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Director General post is set at Level-15, ranging from Rs. 1,82,200 to Rs. 2,24,100 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Director General position?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's degree in Engineering/Technology or a Master's degree in Computer Applications/M.Sc. or a Master's degree in Technology/Engineering or a Ph.D. in relevant fields, along with significant post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age limit for the STPI Director General post?
faq.answer: Yes, the maximum age limit for the Director General post is 58 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the STPI Director General recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Director General role?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves a Personal Interaction. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Deputation.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of STPI?
faq.answer: The official website of Software Technology Parks of India (STPI) is www.meity.gov.in.
